title: USDC issuer Circle raises $222M in Arc token presale valued at $3B
snippet: Circle raised $222 million in an ARC token presale led by a16z Crypto as Q1 revenue hit $694 million and USDC circulation climbed to $77 billion.

title: Augustus gets conditional OCC approval for AI and stablecoin bank
snippet: Peter Thiel-backed Augustus has won conditional OCC approval for a US bank charter focused on AI-driven payments and stablecoin settlement infrastructure.

title: Circle Raises $222M in Arc Token Presale at $3B Valuation
snippet: The USDC issuer announced the raise, with investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Blackrock, alongside its Q1 results.

title: Bank of England chief says global stablecoin rules will ‘wrestle’ with US
snippet: Global regulators will have to confront US policy on dollar-backed stablecoins as they seek international standards for payment tokens, Andrew Bailey said.

title: Galaxy-backed Boundary to launch ‘verifiable’ institutional stablecoin USBD
snippet: The project has raised $2 million in pre-seed funding led by Galaxy Ventures and plans to launch USBD on Ethereum in early summer 2026.

title: Circle raises $222M in Arc token presale at $3B FDV from a16z crypto, BlackRock and others; Q1 revenue up 20%
snippet: Circle raised $222M in an Arc presale at a $3B valuation; BlackRock, Apollo, and a16z invest as Q1 revenue reaches $694M and USDC hits $77B.

title: MoonPay Acquires Dawn Labs, Launches AI Trading Copilot for Prediction Markets
snippet: MoonPay’s new Dawn CLI AI trading product lets users turn plain-English prompts into automated crypto trading strategies.

title: 7 Democrats seen as ‘key’ to advancing CLARITY Act: Galaxy
snippet: The CLARITY Act, introduced in July 2025, stalled in January after Coinbase withdrew its support for the legislation over concerns about legal protections and stablecoin yields.

title: Circle Gives AI Agents USDC Stablecoin Powers Alongside $222M Arc Token Sale
snippet: USDC issuer Circle launched a suite of tools designed to let AI agents hold money, pay for services, and transact without human involvement.

title: Sharplink Q1 revenue tops $12 million as it pursues ‘singles and doubles’ hits in ETH yield

title: SUI spikes 50% amid staking moves, zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push
snippet: Adeniyi Abiodun, co-founder of Mysten Labs, announced at an event in Miami plans for zero-fee stablecoin transfers on Sui and reiterated the ambition to add private transactions.

title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Markup Comes May 14
snippet: The Clarity Act finally has a real markup date, while BlackRock is making its biggest tokenization push yet.

title: Circle makes USDC push into AI agent payment tools
snippet: The new tools let AI agents hold wallets, discover services and make programmable USDC payments across blockchain networks.

title: Ark Invest buys $5.5 million worth of Circle shares as stock jumps 16% on Q1 earnings
snippet: Circle's shares closed up 15.91% at $131.76 on Monday after the stablecoin issuer disclosed its first-quarter 2026 results.

title: American Bankers Association CEO makes final-hour push for tightened limits on stablecoin rewards ahead of Senate committee vote
snippet: Days before a key Senate committee to vote on crypto legislation, ABA CEO Rob Nichols sent a letter to bank executives.

title: Crypto Wallets Just Got Rebuilt for a World Run by AI
snippet: Banks require a government-issued ID. Credit cards require a physical applicant. Payment processors require multifactor authentication from a person. title: Ripple receives $200M credit line to expand institutional prime brokerage
snippet: Financing from Neuberger Berman will increase Ripple Prime’s capacity to offer margin lending and other brokerage services to institutional clients trading across crypto and traditional markets.

title: S&P 500 payments firm Corpay taps BVNK to add stablecoin wallets for global customers
snippet: Corpay partnered with BVNK to add stablecoin wallets and 24/7 settlement across its 800,000-client global payments network.

title: Crypto.com receives UAE license for Dubai government crypto payments
snippet: Crypto.com says a new UAE Stored Value Facilities license will let residents pay Dubai government fees in crypto, as the company doubles down on regulated expansion in the Middle East and beyond.

title: Veteran investor bets on Ethereum as AI agents drive tokenization demand
snippet: AI agents need “food,” and that food is not physical food; it is tokens, said Jordi Visser.

title: Circle stock rallies 15% as Wall Street sees further upside in stablecoin adoption

title: Crypto Funds Add $858M as Clarity Act Drives Market Optimism

title: Anchorage Digital Ends USDG Promotion to Assert Stablecoin Neutrality
snippet: Anchorage Digital will take a less active role in the Global Dollar Network as it becomes a white-label stablecoin issuer for more companies and takes a more neutral stance on individual stablecoins, CoinDesk reported Monday (May 11), citing its interview with Anchorage Digital CEO Nathan McCauley.

title: Crypto’s Defining Week Arrives as Senate Pushes CLARITY Act Forward
snippet: There may be few days as important to crypto in the U.S. as this coming Thursday (May 14). title: XRP metrics line up bull signals for ‘full-scale rally’ to $2
snippet: XRP is giving hints that a price breakout may be underway, based on several technical and onchain indicators, with bulls eyeing $2 as the first stop.
